---
name: Failure mode report
about: Document a pattern of drift that AnchorStack does not currently address
title: '[FAILURE MODE] '
labels: failure-mode
assignees: ''
---

## What failed

Describe the specific type of drift or failure that occurred.
Be precise: what was produced, what was wrong with it, and why it was wrong.

## Domain

What domain were you working in?
(e.g., legal claims, architectural descriptions, investor materials, partner communications)

## What the current templates missed

Which template(s) were you using? What specifically did not prevent this failure?

## Proposed constraint

What constraint, checklist item, or forbidden language entry would have caught this?

Write it in guardian format:

> **[Constraint name]:** [Specific, binary statement of what cannot be done]

## Is this generalizable?

Domain-specific or broadly applicable?
